grid.code: stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo

query.text:
declare @key nvarchar(4000), @fromClause nvarchar(4000), @joinClause nvarchar(4000), @externalJoin nvarchar(4000), @unitKey nvarchar(4000), @siteKey nvarchar(4000) declare @year int, @d smalldatetime, @stt_rec varchar(33)
select @d = ngay_ct, @stt_rec = replace(stt_rec, '''', '') from kkyc with(index(so_ct)) where so_ct = @so_ct select @year = year(max(value)) from (select @d as value union all select ngay_gh1 from dmstt) a
select @externalJoin = 'left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt', @joinClause = ' left join dmkho c on a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho', @fromClause = 'kktt$' + rtrim(@year) + ' a' -- select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' if (@ma_kho <> '') select @key = @key + ' and a.ma_kho like ''' + replace(@ma_kho, '''', '') + '%'''
select @unitKey = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetUnitFilter('a.ma_dvcs', '', @@userID, @@admin) exec FastBusiness$System$GetSiteFilter 'c.ma_kho', '', @unitKey, @@userID, @@admin, @siteKey output
if @unitKey is not null select @key = @key + ' and ' + replace(@unitKey, 'a.', 'c.') if @siteKey is not null select @key = @key + ' and ' + @siteKey
exec FastBusiness$Partition$ExecutePageExternal @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @@textExternal, @fromClause, @joinClause, @externalJoin, @key, 'ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo', 'rtrim(a.ma_kho) + rtrim(a.ma_vi_tri) + rtrim(a.ma_vt) + rtrim(a.dvt) + rtrim(a.ma_lo) + rtrim(a.stt_rec)', 'ngay_ct', null, null, null, @@admin, @@userID

action.text:
select @stt_rec = replace(@stt_rec, '''', '') declare @d smalldatetime, @q nvarchar(4000), @r int select @d = ngay_ct from kkyc where stt_rec = @stt_rec
create table #kktt(ma_kho varchar(32),stt int not null identity(1, 1)) select @q = 'insert into #kktt select ma_kho from kktt$' + rtrim(year(@d)) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec sp_executesql @q
-- if exists(select 1 from #kktt) begin if @@admin <> 1 select @r = min(stt) from #kktt a where not exists(select 1 from dmkho c where a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_del = 1)) if @r is null exec FastBusiness$System$CheckImportSiteRights '#kktt', 'ma_kho', 'stt', @@userID, @@admin, @r output -- if @r is null begin select @q = @q + ' delete kktt$' + rtrim(year(@d)) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' select @q = @q + ' select 1 as result' exec sp_executesql @q end else select 0 as result -- drop table #kktt return end
